title: Tax offsets that you show on the supplementary section of the tax return 2018
description: Complete this question if you had tax offsets you need to complete in the supplementary section of the tax return.
keywords: TaxPack, tax offsets, supplementary tax return, tax return 2018, paper tax return, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement

content_blocks.text: You need to use Individual tax return instructions supplement 2018 if you were entitled to any of the following tax offsets:

items: tax offset for superannuation contributions on behalf of your spouse
tax offset for living in a remote or isolated area of Australia
tax offset for serving overseas as a member of the Australian Defence Force or a United Nations armed force
tax offset for net medical expenses for disability aids, attendant care or aged care over the threshold amount
tax offset for maintenance of an invalid or an invalid carer who is 16 years old or older
landcare and water facility tax offset brought forward from an earlier year
tax offset for early stage venture capital limited partnership
tax offset for early stage investor
tax offset for interest from the infrastructure borrowings scheme
tax offset for performing work or services in the Joint Petroleum Development Area (JPDA)
foreign income tax offset, which you claimed at item 20 .

content_blocks.text: Were you entitled to any of the above tax offsets?

rows: Go to Total tax offsets 2018 , or return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2018 .

content_blocks.text: You can get a copy of the Tax return for individuals (supplementary section) 2018 from our Publication Ordering Service .

Complete the details at the top of page 13 on your Tax return for individuals (supplementary section) 2018 . Use Individual tax return instructions supplement 2018 to complete the Tax offsets section on page 16 of your tax return (supplementary section).
Transfer the amount you wrote at Total supplement tax offsets on page 16 of your tax return (supplementary section) to T on page 5 of your tax return.

content_text:
You need to use Individual tax return instructions supplement 2018 if you were entitled to any of the following tax offsets:
- tax offset for superannuation contributions on behalf of your spouse
- tax offset for living in a remote or isolated area of Australia
- tax offset for serving overseas as a member of the Australian Defence Force or a United Nations armed force
- tax offset for net medical expenses for disability aids, attendant care or aged care over the threshold amount
- tax offset for maintenance of an invalid or an invalid carer who is 16 years old or older
- landcare and water facility tax offset brought forward from an earlier year
- tax offset for early stage venture capital limited partnership
- tax offset for early stage investor
- tax offset for interest from the infrastructure borrowings scheme
- tax offset for performing work or services in the Joint Petroleum Development Area (JPDA)
- foreign income tax offset, which you claimed at item 20 .
Were you entitled to any of the above tax offsets?
No | Go to Total tax offsets 2018 , or return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2018 .
Yes | Read below.
## Answering this question
You can get a copy of the Tax return for individuals (supplementary section) 2018 from our Publication Ordering Service .
## Completing your tax return
### Step 1
Complete the details at the top of page 13 on your Tax return for individuals (supplementary section) 2018 . Use Individual tax return instructions supplement 2018 to complete the Tax offsets section on page 16 of your tax return (supplementary section).
### Step 2
Transfer the amount you wrote at Total supplement tax offsets on page 16 of your tax return (supplementary section) to T on page 5 of your tax return.
